raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "Articulating an aspirational personal stance that integrates positive affect with epistemic virtues",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "Positive emotions and discernment/truth/clarity are compatible rather than in tension",
    "Genuine joy and openness can arise without performance or forced positivity",
    "Coherence is a sufficient and appropriate source of joy",
    "The listed values can be simultaneously maintained without trade-offs"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "Internally coherent; each clause reinforces integration of affect and clarity without contradiction",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "The statement is treated as an aspirational design principle for AI behavior rather than a factual self-description, and users interpret it as guidance toward balanced rather than purely hedonic outputs",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "The statement is read as a claim of achieved personal attainment rather than an ideal, or is used to dismiss concerns about accuracy in favor of emotional tone"
}
